case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. JAVIUS, TONI et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT JAVIUS, TONI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAVIUS, TONI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 730 MISSOURI ST, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JAVIUS, TONI
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: DAVIS, MATTHEW DAVID SUBSTITUTED FOR KIMERLING, ALLYCE SUSAN AS ATTORNEY FOR HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT JAVIUS, TONI
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $0. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT JAVIUS, TONI DOES I-X SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION SERVED MAR-22-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JAVIUS, TONI
